---
name: Enhancement
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What should be added or improved? One sentence.

## Motivation

Why does this matter? Who benefits?

## Proposed Approach

How would you implement this? Which files would need to change?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why not those?

## Acceptance Criteria

How do we know this is done?
- [ ] 
- [ ]
